data.keyword: Which Louisville mental health providers offer case management?
data.tag: lmhg ai mode Which Louisville mental health providers offer case management?

result.keyword: Which Louisville mental health providers offer case management?

items.markdown:
Several mental health providers in Louisville offer case management services to assist with coordinating care, accessing resources, and developing treatment plans.[[1]](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/)[[2]](https://www.indeed.com/q-case-manager-l-louisville,-ky-jobs.html)

- **[Seven Counties Services](https://sevencounties.org/resources/blog/what-is-case-management/):** Offers comprehensive case management for children, adults, and families, including services for mental health, substance use, and intellectual/developmental disabilities.[](https://sevencounties.org/resources/blog/what-is-case-management/) [[1]](https://sevencounties.org/resources/blog/what-is-case-management/)
- **[Best Life Counseling & Wellness](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/):** Provides Targeted Case Management (TCM) in Louisville, focusing on holistic care, including collaboration with in-house therapists and nurse practitioners.[](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/) [[1]](https://www.bestlifelouisville.com/case-management/)
- **[Kentucky Mental Health Care](https://kentuckymentalhealth.com/kentucky-case-management/):** Offers both in-person and remote case management services to help patients navigate and coordinate care.[](https://kentuckymentalhealth.com/kentucky-case-management/) [[1]](https://kentuckymentalhealth.com/kentucky-case-management/)
- **[Neighborhood Place](https://www.findhelp.org/care/case-management--louisville-ky):** Provides community-based case management services aimed at helping individuals and families address various needs.[](https://www.findhelp.org/care/case-management--louisville-ky) [[1]](https://www.findhelp.org/care/case-management--louisville-ky)
- **LifeSpring Health Systems:** Offers case management services, including Assertive Community Treatment (ACT) teams, with locations in the nearby Jeffersonville area.[](https://www.indeed.com/q-case-manager-l-louisville,-ky-jobs.html) [[1]](https://www.indeed.com/q-case-manager-l-louisville,-ky-jobs.html)

To help you find the best fit, are you looking for **adult or child services** , and do you have a preference for **in-person or telehealth** case management?
